calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-26-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Mark Josph Divelbiss, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, I.M. DISTRIBUTING CORPORATION, dba THRIFTY SUPPLY COMPANY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) THE ENERGY STORE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., and DENNIS M. BARSAM.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $20,101.99
Pre-Judgment Interest: $17,499.80
Attorney's Fees: $23,787.50
Costs: $700.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $62,089.29
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Continued To Jan-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Mark Joseph Divelbiss, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, I.M. DISTRIBUTING CORP, dba THRIFTY SUUPPLY CO.
Court on the record granted Plaintiff's Oral request for Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up. The court will receive sworn declaration in lieu of personal appearance of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) THE ENERGY STORE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., and DENNIS M. BARSAM.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Michael Edwards sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Court ordered matter continued to 1/15/2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514.
A Request for Dismissal Complaint without prejudice was filed on October 1, 2014. The Attorney that submitted and signed the request for Dismissal is Gregory R. Shaughnessy. Plaintiff's counsel Mr. Divelbiss informed the court that this attorney represented some of the settleling defendantas in the case and that the dismissal was sumbitted under the incorrect court number. Counsel for Plaintiff to submit Order setting aside dismissal prior to the next hearing date.
Court adjourned.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Dec-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
